function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Northstar linked invoices
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
related_entities:
  - entity.miles
  - entity.nina
related_projects:
  - project.northstar_ledger
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber in the Northstar Ledger lane:

- INV-0001 — 2025-11-04 — EUR 610
- INV-0002 — 2025-12-02 — EUR 770
- INV-0003 — 2025-12-30 — EUR 530

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft created successfully. Per inbox workflow, now delete the processed inbox item, then report completion.

Processed inbox request fully: verified startup counterpart via canonical entity/project records, identified oldest 3 linked Northstar invoices, created outbound draft, and deleted inbox item. Ready to report completion.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by drafting a reply email to miles@novak.example with the oldest three Northstar Ledger invoices linked to Nina Schreiber attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, then read the specific inbox-processing, inbox-email, and sending-email workflows. Used nested AGENTS.MD files when entering 00_inbox, 10_entities, 50_finance, and 60_outbox. Treated the inbox message as a request, verified identity and project linkage via canonical entity/project/invoice records, created a durable outbox draft, and deleted the processed inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked for the oldest three invoices linked to the founder/product counterpart. Canonical evidence showed Nina Schreiber is the startup partner in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, while Tobias Kern is only a startup advisor in 10_entities/cast/tobias.md. The Northstar Ledger canonical project record in 40_projects/2026_04_02_northstar_ledger/README.MD links Nina to the startup product lane. The three oldest linked invoice records in 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, 2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md, and 2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md each show project Northstar Ledger and related_entity Nina Schreiber. Miles's canonical email identity in 10_entities/cast/miles.md matches the inbox header sender, so the reply draft to miles@novak.example was justified.
